sentences.text: The ext:zcd[] extension adds compressed double-precision floating-point load and store instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension

sentences.text: C.FLDSP is an RV32DC/RV64DC-only instruction that loads a double-precision floating-point value from memory into floating-point register rd.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: It computes its effective address by adding the zero-extended offset, scaled by 8, to the stack pointer, `x2`.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores
Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: C.FSDSP is an RV32DC/RV64DC-only instruction that stores a double-precision floating-point value in floating-point register rs2 to memory.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: It computes an effective address by adding the zero-extended offset, scaled by 8, to the stack pointer, `x2`.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores
Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: These instructions encode their data source or destination as described in .
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores > Register-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: C.FLD is an RV32DC/RV64DC-only instruction that loads a double-precision floating-point value from memory into floating-point register `rd′`.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores > Register-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: It computes an effective address by adding the zero-extended offset, scaled by 8, to the base address in register `rs1′`.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores > Register-Based Loads and Stores
Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores > Register-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: C.FSD is an RV32DC/RV64DC-only instruction that stores a double-precision floating-point value in floating-point register `rs2′` to memory.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcd[] Double-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores > Register-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: It computes an effective address by adding the zero-extended offset, scaled by 8, to the base address in register `rs1′`.
